nodes.label: Jenks Natural Breaks Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Statistical method for classifying sensor data into natural groupings based on value distributions

nodes.label: Eddy Covariance Sensors
nodes.rationale: Environmental measurement instruments monitoring CO2 flux, wind, temperature, radiation, and humidity

nodes.label: Data Deduplication Logic
nodes.rationale: Prevents duplicate data points by tracking sensor_timestamp_key combinations

nodes.label: Circular Buffer (2880 points)
nodes.rationale: Maintains 24 hours of data at 5-minute intervals (2880 points = 24h Ã— 12 readings/hour)

nodes.label: NDJSON Data Format
nodes.rationale: Newline-delimited JSON format for streaming sensor data from towers

nodes.label: HTTP/1.0 Protocol
nodes.rationale: Tower sensors require HTTP/1.0 (not 1.1) for proper data streaming

nodes.label: Multi-Site Monitoring
nodes.rationale: System supports monitoring multiple EC tower sites simultaneously with parallel polling

nodes.label: Server-Side I/O Issue
nodes.rationale: FS module usage in page.tsx breaks Next.js conventions and may cause build issues

nodes.label: State Management Concerns
nodes.rationale: Dashboard component mixes polling logic with UI state, needs proper abstraction
